title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 454.565 - Report to the general assembly, when
text:
454.565.  Report to the general assembly, when. — Beginning in 2000, the family support division shall report to the general assembly regarding the family support payment center by December 1, 2000, and by each December first thereafter.  Such report shall include recommendations and an analysis of the efficiency and effectiveness of the system.
(L. 1999 S.B. 291, A.L. 2014 H.B. 1299 Revision)
